entities.name: LETTUCE
entities.description: A vegetable crop studied for its resistance gene cluster

entities.name: BREMIA LACTUCAE
entities.description: An oomycete downy mildew fungus that affects lettuce

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The trait of being able to withstand infection by Bremia lactucae

entities.name: DM GENES
entities.description: Genes that confer resistance to the downy mildew fungus

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENE CLUSTER
entities.description: A major genomic region in lettuce containing multiple resistance genes

entities.name: DIANA
entities.description: A specific cultivar of lettuce containing the Dm3 gene

entities.name: DM3
entities.description: A specific resistance gene located within the major resistance cluster

entities.name: DELETION BREAKPOINT MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to map the chromosomal region flanking Dm3

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Tools used to saturate the deletion breakpoint map

entities.name: RGC2
entities.description: A family of resistance gene candidates encoding specific motifs

entities.name: NUCLEOTIDE BINDING SITE
entities.description: A motif encoded by RGC2 genes, characteristic of plant disease resistance genes

entities.name: LEUCINE-RICH REPEAT REGION
entities.description: A motif encoded by RGC2 genes, characteristic of plant disease resistance genes

entities.name: PLANT DISEASE RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide plants with resistance to diseases

entities.name: BAC CLONES
entities.description: Bacterial artificial chromosome clones used to identify and characterize RGC2 family members

entities.name: RFLP MARKERS
entities.description: Duplicated restriction fragment length polymorphism markers used to identify BAC clones

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to determine the evolutionary relationships of RGC2 sequences

entities.name: PHYSICAL MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to determine the physical arrangement of RGC2 sequences

entities.name: LOW-COPY GENOMIC SEQUENCES
entities.description: An analysis method used to detect genes in the Dm3 region

entities.name: RETROTRANSPOSONS
entities.description: Genetic elements detected in the Dm3 region

entities.name: TRANSPOSABLE ELEMENTS
entities.description: Genetic elements detected in the Dm3 region

entities.name: RECOMBINATION
entities.description: A process that may generate new resistance phenotypes in the RGC2 family

entities.name: UNEQUAL CROSSING OVER
entities.description: A process that may generate new resistance phenotypes in the RGC2 family
